description_long: This object is a modern, tactical shotgun with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly dark color scheme. The barrel is elongated and features a cylindrical suppressor or muzzle device with a warning symbol, suggesting advanced or specialized use. The receiver and upper frame have metallic accents and vented panels, while the grip is ergonomic with a pronounced finger guard and textured details for secure handling. A sighting device is mounted on the top rail, and the trigger guard is large and angular, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction appears robust, with a mix of metal and polymer materials, and the design is optimized for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern tactical shotgun with a long, suppressed barrel, angular frame, and ergonomic grip, featuring metallic and polymer construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the suppressor, vented upper frame, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle opening, sighting device, and the symmetry of the upper frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, warning symbol, and the detailed grip structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, sight alignment, and the angular design of the grip and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, cylindrical suppressor and vented upper frame
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, angular trigger guard with a squared profile and reinforced lower edge
